APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Dean Rossi, esq. (408.495.3900; dean@rdlaw.net) of Rossi Domingue LLP for Defendants.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed re: stipulation and proposed order submitted for filing on Jan. 18, 2022. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF OLMEC BUILDERS, INC.'s Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions Against Defendant Moon Man Promo Corp. is taken under submission for court to review the stipulation.

Mr. Rossi to send a copy of the stipulation and proposed order to tom@thomascohen.com.
